calendar.matters:
APPEAL OF CIVIL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Affirmed

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kimberly Barrientos of Zee Law Group telephone number 909-399-9610 apperaed by telephone for Plaintiff Resurgence Financial, LLC.
Jason Luu of Bay Area Legal Aid telephone number 415-982-1300 for and with Defendant Michael Castello.

Mr. Castello is sworn in and testifies under oath that he has no knowlege of who Monica Gutierrez is. Ms. Barrientos presents oral argument. The Court vacates its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MICHAEL CASTELLO'S Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment is granted. Mr. Castello was not served through substituted service based on his testimony. Mr. Luu is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Off Calendar
